COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-03-2002 Judgment Entered

Plaintiff"s Atty: Arnold Evye II
Defendant in Pro Per: Lorraine Short

Plaintiff's Witness: Shona Randolph, housing mgr.

Plaintiff's Exhibit: 3 Day Notice (admitted into Evidence).

Defense Witness: Lorraine Short

Court issues Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and possession of premises (see scanned document).

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2002 Continued To Sep-03-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept, 611 for settlement conference. Present: Judge Diane Wick; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Plaintiff represented by Arnold W. Evje, Esq., and there being no appearance by the defendant, the Court took the matter off the settlement conference calendar. Request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date of September 3,2002 is confirmed.
